developments.t_zh: 7月14日推出 Claude for Teachers：美国 K-12 认证教师免费用高级工具，配全美50州课标对齐的教学技能
developments.t_en: Launched Claude for Teachers July 14 — verified US K-12 educators get free premium tools plus teaching skills aligned to standards in all 50 states

developments.t_zh: 与 Blackstone 合作押注「实施层」：下一个万亿美元 AI 生意是落地实施而非模型本身
developments.t_en: Partnered with Blackstone on the bet that the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models

developments.t_zh: 微软据报培训销售团队贬低 OpenAI 与 Anthropic，渠道竞争公开化
developments.t_en: Microsoft is reportedly training its salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic — channel competition turning overt

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 闭源前沿进入分发下沉周期：教育、政府、实施服务多线铺开；与最大渠道伙伴微软的摩擦公开化，说明企业市场已从共生转向争夺
modelWatch.gap_note_en: The closed frontier is in a distribution push — education, government, implementation services — while open friction with Microsoft signals the enterprise market has shifted from symbiosis to contest

developments.t_zh: 发布 GPT-Red 自动化红队系统：以 AI 攻击 AI 改进提示注入防御，称安全可随能力扩展
developments.t_en: Introduced GPT-Red, an automated red-teaming system that attacks other AIs to harden prompt-injection defenses, pitching safety that scales with capability

developments.t_zh: 首款硬件据报为便携式 ChatGPT 音箱，硬件入口战略浮出水面
developments.t_en: First hardware product is reportedly a portable ChatGPT speaker — the hardware-entry strategy surfacing

developments.t_zh: 纽约时报请求法官制裁 OpenAI，训练数据版权诉讼升级
developments.t_en: The New York Times asked a judge to sanction OpenAI as the training-data copyright suit escalates

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: GPT-5.6 公发后一周节奏转缓，重心移向硬件入口与安全叙事；版权诉讼升级是闭源商业模式的长尾风险
modelWatch.gap_note_en: A quieter week after the GPT-5.6 launch, with focus shifting to hardware entry and the safety narrative; the escalating copyright fight remains the closed model's tail risk

developments.t_zh: 港股上市后涨近1500%，宣布配售募资约40亿美元并计划上海二次上市；低流通盘风险仍存
developments.t_en: After a near-1,500% rally since its January Hong Kong listing, Zhipu is raising ~$4B in a share sale and eyeing a Shanghai listing; low-float risk persists

developments.t_zh: GLM-5.2 首周 token 用量暴增至多27倍，正与国内设计公司初步接触探索自研 ASIC
developments.t_en: GLM-5.2 daily token usage surged up to 27x in its first week; Zhipu is in early talks with domestic design houses on a custom ASIC

developments.t_zh: SCMP：智谱称追求 AGI 而非短期利润，逆行业营收放缓继续加码研发
developments.t_en: SCMP: Zhipu says it is pursuing AGI over quick profits, doubling down on R&D against an industry slump

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 开源线首次拿到资本市场的完整定价：1500%涨幅+40亿美元配售证明「开源≠无商业模式」；算力约束（27倍用量+出口管制）正把开源厂商推向自研芯片
modelWatch.gap_note_en: The open-weight route just got fully priced by capital markets — a 1,500% rally and $4B raise refute 'open means no business model'; compute constraints (27x usage under export controls) are pushing open vendors toward custom silicon

modelWatch.current_line: Qwen3.7 (Max flagship / Plus multimodal, proprietary API)

developments.t_zh: 苹果 Apple Intelligence 获中国监管批准落地，Qwen 集成进 iOS/macOS 等系统；消息公布 BABA 美股+4%
developments.t_en: Apple Intelligence cleared for China launch with Qwen integrated across iOS, iPadOS, macOS and visionOS; BABA's US shares rose 4% on the news

developments.t_zh: 《人工智能拟人化交互服务管理暂行办法》7月15日生效，Qwen 拟人 agent 与用户自建 agent 功能关停
developments.t_en: China's AI anthropomorphic-interaction rules took effect July 15; Qwen shut down its humanlike and user-created agent features

developments.t_zh: 阿里云扩展 AI 栈：新 agent 开发工具与 Qwen Cloud 上线，强化 API/云一体分发
developments.t_en: Alibaba Cloud expanded its AI stack with new agent tooling and Qwen Cloud, deepening the API-plus-cloud distribution play

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 同一周内「进苹果」与「关 agent」并存：API 独占价值获苹果历史性背书，而消费端拟人化产品被监管清零——Qwen 的价值进一步向 B 端与云集中
modelWatch.gap_note_en: In the same week Qwen got into Apple and shut its agents down: historic validation of the proprietary-API route on one side, regulators zeroing out consumer anthropomorphic products on the other — value concentrating further in B2B and cloud

equities.correlation_note_zh: 美光为 Anthropic 首选内存/存储伙伴；本周随内存板块入技术熊市大幅回撤，与厂商基本面无关
博通定制芯片客户含 Anthropic；本周获 Morgan Stanley 重申「核心 AI 赢家」
AWS 为 Anthropic 主要云与算力伙伴，Claude 迭代传导至其 capex 与云收入
谷歌为 Anthropic 股东兼云供应商，TPU 算力承接其训练需求
M365 Copilot 首选 GPT-5.6；但微软销售团队据报同时贬低 OpenAI，共生关系现裂痕
与 OpenAI 共研 Jalapeño 推理芯片，年底起部署整机架，定制 ASIC 主线
OpenAI 训练/推理算力主力供应商；本周随 AI 芯片三连跌回撤
腾讯为智谱投资方，智谱40亿美元配售与1500%涨幅直接抬升其 AI 持仓价值
寒武纪：智谱探索自研 ASIC 显示国产推理算力需求外溢，本土芯片设计生态受益
科大讯飞：垂直闭源路线受开源边际成本下降挤压
Qwen 进入 Apple Intelligence 中国版直接落地为 API/云收入，消息日美股+4%；agent 关停影响集中在 C 端
百度同获苹果合作但以 Qwen 为主模型，文心在企业 API 市场压力加大

weeklyTake.zh: 本周两条主线。其一，中国模型公司完成「资本化+分发」双跳：智谱1500%涨幅后配售40亿美元并计划上海上市，Qwen 进入 Apple Intelligence 中国版（BABA+4%）——同时拟人化 agent 因新规7月15日集体关停，价值向 B 端集中。其二，美国闭源转入分发深水区：Anthropic 铺教育/政府/实施层，OpenAI 憋硬件音箱，微软被曝培训销售贬低两家——渠道从共生转向争夺。资本市场端：内存板块正式入技术熊市（半导体自6/25蒸发约1.5万亿美元市值），而 UBS 大幅上调 CXL 互连双雄逆势领涨，板块内部剧烈轮动。
weeklyTake.en: Two threads this week. One: China's model companies pulled off a capitalization-plus-distribution double — Zhipu raised $4B after a 1,500% rally and Qwen landed inside Apple Intelligence for China (BABA +4%), even as new rules shut down anthropomorphic agents on July 15, pushing value toward B2B. Two: US closed labs went deep on distribution — Anthropic into classrooms, government and implementation; OpenAI reportedly building a ChatGPT speaker; Microsoft caught coaching salespeople against both. In markets, memory entered a technical bear (semis shed ~$1.5T since June 25) while UBS's big CXL upgrades sent the interconnect names the other way — violent rotation inside the AI trade.

tracks.state_zh: 板块与产业背离扩大：MU/三星/海力士较高点回撤逾20%入技术熊市；但16-Hi HBM4 争夺英伟达四季度订单、三星 HBM4E 送样且良率破70%，供给端叙事未变
tracks.state_en: The gap between tape and industry widened: MU, Samsung and SK Hynix fell 20%+ into a technical bear, yet 16-Hi HBM4 competition for NVIDIA's Q4 orders and Samsung's 70%+ yield HBM4E sampling keep the supply-side story intact

tracks.state_zh: CXL 首获大行定量背书：UBS 称 CXL ASIC 附加市场2030年达70-100亿美元，上调 ALAB 目标价至400、MRVL 至340；ALAB 单日+16%，为本周 AI 硬件最强主线
tracks.state_en: CXL got its first big-bank quantification: UBS sized the CXL ASIC attach market at $7-10B by 2030, lifting ALAB's target to $400 and MRVL's to $340; ALAB jumped 16% in a day — the strongest AI-hardware thread this week

tracks.state_zh: 多空叙事罕见对峙：Goldman 基于供给紧张给 SNDK 2200美元目标价，而市场同期押注 NAND 涨价周期见顶（超大规模客户需求转弱报道）；8月5日 SNDK 财报成为裁判
tracks.state_en: A rare bull-bear standoff: Goldman's $2,200 SNDK target on supply tightness versus the market betting NAND pricing has peaked on softer-hyperscaler reports; the Aug 5 SNDK print is the referee

cards.moat_zh: 美国唯一 HBM 本土产能+政策红利；HBM 售罄至2027，16份不可撤销合同锁定超220亿美元 HBM 收入
cards.thesis_zh: 回撤加深：7月17日收约849美元，较6月25日高点回撤约25%-30%，月内-18%；Michael Burry 披露约1052美元建仓的直接空头。基本面证据（HBM 锁单、16-Hi HBM4 竞标）未变，本轮是估值与情绪重定价
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 竞争中份额仍居第三；知名空头入场放大波动，板块对供给反转恐惧高度敏感
cards.moat_en: Only US-based HBM maker with policy tailwind; HBM sold out through 2027 with $22B+ in non-cancelable contracts
cards.thesis_en: The drawdown deepened: ~$849 close July 17, roughly 25-30% off the June 25 peak and -18% on the month, with Michael Burry disclosing a direct short entered near $1,052. The fundamental evidence — locked HBM contracts, 16-Hi HBM4 bidding — is unchanged; this is a valuation and sentiment repricing
cards.key_risk_en: Still #3 in HBM4 share; a high-profile short amplifies volatility in a group acutely sensitive to oversupply fear

cards.moat_zh: HBM 市占约50-55%居首，为 NVIDIA HBM4 供应约三分之二；265亿美元创纪录 ADR 发行获逾7倍超额认购
cards.thesis_zh: 上市第二周即受洗礼：7月14日完成 SKHYV→SKHY 转常规交易，股价从首日收盘168.01回落至约154，盘中一度触及145.57上市后低点；管理层称内存短缺或延续至2030年后，长期叙事与新股波动并存
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 量产节奏推迟至3Q26，三星 HBM4E 送样抢跑；新股波动与解禁压力
cards.moat_en: HBM leader at ~50-55% share supplying roughly two-thirds of NVIDIA's HBM4; the record $26.5B ADR offering was 7x+ oversubscribed
cards.thesis_en: Baptism by fire in week two: the SKHYV-to-SKHY switch completed July 14 as shares slid from the $168.01 debut close to ~$154, touching a post-listing low of $145.57; management sees the memory shortage extending beyond 2030 — a long thesis living inside new-listing volatility
cards.key_risk_en: HBM4 volume ramp slipped to 3Q26 while Samsung's HBM4E sampling accelerates; new-listing volatility and lockup overhang

cards.moat_zh: 内存+代工+终端垂直一体，HBM 市占约35-40%；已出货业界首批12层 HBM4E 样品（16Gbps），HBM4E 良率据报突破70%
cards.thesis_zh: HBM4E 世代继续抢跑：率先送样12层 HBM4E、良率破70%；但英伟达 HBM4 大批量订单据报仍停留在付费验证阶段——执行领先与客户认证落地之间的缺口是当前关键变量
cards.key_risk_zh: OTC ADR 流动性极差，美股敞口工具性弱；英伟达量产订单未落地前，抢跑叙事随时可被证伪
cards.moat_en: Vertically integrated memory+foundry+devices; ~35-40% HBM share, first-in-industry 12-layer HBM4E samples shipped (16Gbps) with yields reportedly above 70%
cards.thesis_en: Still out-front on the HBM4E generation — first 12-layer samples shipped, yields past 70% — but NVIDIA's HBM4 volume order reportedly remains at the paid-evaluation stage; the gap between execution lead and customer qualification is the swing variable
cards.key_risk_en: Very thin OTC ADR liquidity limits US-market expression; until the NVIDIA volume order lands, the front-runner narrative is falsifiable at any time

cards.moat_zh: 智能互连平台横跨 CXL/PCIe/Ethernet/NVLink Fusion/UALink + COSMOS 软件栈，AI 集群扩张的连接层收税人
cards.thesis_zh: UBS 将目标价从205大幅上调至400：CXL ASIC 附加市场2030年达70-100亿美元，2027/2028收入预期上调至25/33亿美元；7月13日单日+16%，30日累计约+26%——T2 主线首次获大行定量背书的最大受益者
cards.key_risk_zh: 估值极高且已计入乐观预期；互连协议路线之争（NVLink 私有生态 vs 开放 CXL/UALink）可能重排份额
cards.moat_en: Intelligent connectivity platform spanning CXL, PCIe, Ethernet, NVLink Fusion and UALink plus the COSMOS software suite — a toll-taker on AI cluster scale-out
cards.thesis_en: UBS nearly doubled its target from $205 to $400, sizing the CXL ASIC attach market at $7-10B by 2030 and lifting 2027/28 revenue estimates to $2.5B/$3.3B; +16% on July 13 and ~+26% over 30 days — the biggest beneficiary of T2's first big-bank quantification
cards.key_risk_en: Rich valuation now embeds the optimistic case; protocol wars (proprietary NVLink vs open CXL/UALink) could reshuffle share

cards.moat_zh: 定制 AI 硅+互连双线：获 NVIDIA 20亿美元投资并纳入 NVLink 生态，数据中心占收入76%；UBS 称其现居 CXL 产品份额第一
cards.thesis_zh: UBS 目标价从230上调至340并指认其为当前 CXL 份额领先者，7月13日+4.1%；50+定制 AI 设计机会、FY29 定制收入目标超100亿美元、3nm XPU 年内量产——互连与近内存定制逻辑双引擎都在本周被重新定价
cards.key_risk_zh: UBS 同时预计 ALAB/博通份额将扩大，领先地位非稳态；定制芯片单客户集中度风险
cards.moat_en: Dual custom-silicon + interconnect franchise: $2B NVIDIA investment with NVLink-ecosystem integration, datacenter at 76% of revenue; UBS says it currently holds the leading CXL product share
cards.thesis_en: UBS raised its target from $230 to $340 naming Marvell the current CXL share leader (+4.1% July 13); with 50+ custom AI design opportunities, $10B custom revenue targeted by FY29 and the 3nm XPU ramping this year, both engines got repriced this week
cards.key_risk_en: UBS itself expects Astera and Broadcom to take share as the market grows; custom-silicon single-customer concentration

cards.moat_zh: 已更名 Everpure，NYSE 代码亦由 PSTG 改为 P（本站暂沿用 PSTG 标识）；全闪存平台转向企业 AI 数据管理，FY26 Q4 营收11亿美元(+20%)、订阅 ARR 19亿美元
cards.thesis_zh: 转型证据累积：6月发布 Data Stream 等 AI-ready 数据平台，FY27 指引43-44亿美元；KV-cache 下沉与推理数据分层利好高性能全闪存阵列的论点维持
cards.key_risk_zh: 超大规模客户自建存储侵蚀高端需求；代码更换或致部分数据源报价中断
cards.moat_en: Renamed Everpure with the NYSE ticker also changed from PSTG to P (this site keeps PSTG as its card key for now); all-flash platform pivoting to enterprise AI data management — FY26 Q4 revenue $1.1B (+20%), subscription ARR $1.9B
cards.thesis_en: Pivot evidence is accumulating: June's Data Stream and AI-ready data platform launches, FY27 guided to $4.3-4.4B; the KV-cache offload and inference-tiering case for high-performance all-flash stands
cards.key_risk_en: Hyperscaler in-house storage erodes the high end; the ticker change may break some data-feed continuity

cards.moat_zh: NAND 纯度最高标的之一，2026年内仍为标普500最强（YTD 约+707%）；7月3日开始送样 BiCS10 1Tb TLC 3D NAND，位密度提升59%
cards.thesis_zh: 多空对峙白热化：Goldman 7月5日将目标价从1200上调至2200（供给紧张逻辑），但随后一周股价在 AI 芯片三连跌中大幅回撤，市场转向押注 NAND 涨价见顶（超大规模需求转弱+中国竞争报道）；8月5日财报直接裁决
cards.key_risk_zh: 消费端承受力见顶+高管减持信号；若财报证实需求转弱，高估值回撤空间大
cards.moat_en: One of the purest NAND plays and still the S&P 500's top 2026 performer (~+707% YTD); began sampling BiCS10 1Tb TLC 3D NAND July 3 with 59% better bit density
cards.thesis_en: The bull-bear standoff went hot: Goldman lifted its target from $1,200 to $2,200 on July 5 (supply-tightness case), yet shares sold off hard in the three-day AI-chip rout as the market bet NAND pricing has peaked on softer-hyperscaler and China-competition reports; the Aug 5 print adjudicates
cards.key_risk_en: Consumer affordability ceiling plus insider-selling optics; if earnings confirm softening demand, the de-rating room is large

cards.moat_zh: 定制 ASIC + 交换/互连双垄断位：六大定制芯片客户（含 OpenAI/Anthropic/Meta/谷歌），下季 AI 收入指引约160亿美元（同比+200%+）
cards.thesis_zh: 与苹果续约至2031、与 OpenAI 共研推理芯片 Jalapeño 年底上架；内存池化所需的 PCIe/CXL 交换与光互连是其腹地
cards.key_risk_zh: AI 收入集中于少数超大客户；客户自研芯片能力内化是长期反噬风险
cards.moat_en: Dual lock on custom ASICs and switching/interconnect: six custom-chip customers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta and Google; ~$16B next-quarter AI revenue guide (+200% YoY)
cards.thesis_en: Apple partnership extended through 2031 and the OpenAI co-developed Jalapeño inference chip racks deploying late this year; PCIe/CXL switching and optical interconnect for pooled memory is home turf
cards.key_risk_en: AI revenue concentrated in a handful of hyperscalers; customers internalizing design capability is the long-term counter-risk

cards.moat_zh: HBM 堆叠使 DRAM 测试强度倍增，测试机是 T1 扩产的隐性受益人；2026年内股价近翻倍
cards.thesis_zh: 美光创纪录季度后 HBM 测试订单预期升温；高贝塔属性下随板块波动，论点未变，7月28日财报验证 HBM 订单是否进入积压
cards.key_risk_zh: 无业绩支撑的估值扩张；内存资本开支若因供给过剩担忧收缩，订单弹性反噬
cards.moat_en: HBM stacking multiplies DRAM test intensity — testers are the quiet beneficiary of every T1 capacity add; stock up ~89% YTD
cards.thesis_en: HBM test-order expectations built after Micron's record quarter; the high-beta profile tracks sector swings but the thesis is intact — the July 28 print tests whether HBM orders are hitting backlog
cards.key_risk_en: Valuation ran ahead of bookings; if memory capex flinches on oversupply fear, order elasticity cuts both ways

catalysts.what: Q2 2026 earnings — confirmation HBM orders are building in backlog

cards.moat_zh: 内存接口芯片+IP 授权双引擎；SOCAMM2 芯片组把 LPDDR5X 引入 AI 服务器内存模组，卡位低功耗高带宽新形态
cards.thesis_zh: 回撤显著：7月13日单日-8%收约103美元，月内约-28%（6月15日高点约143）；Rosenblatt 逆势将目标价上调至165，AI 内存带宽需求逻辑与股价背离，7月27日财报为近催化
cards.key_risk_zh: 多家估值模型仍提示高估；接口芯片竞争（澜起等）与授权收入周期性
cards.moat_en: Memory interface chips plus IP licensing; the SOCAMM2 chipset brings LPDDR5X into AI-server memory modules, staking out the low-power high-bandwidth form factor
cards.thesis_en: A sharp drawdown: -8% on July 13 to ~$103 and roughly -28% on the month from the mid-June ~$143 peak, even as Rosenblatt raised its target to $165 — the AI memory-bandwidth case and the tape have decoupled; the July 27 print is the near catalyst
cards.key_risk_en: Valuation models still flag overvaluation; interface-chip competition (Montage et al.) and licensing cyclicality

postMemory.take_zh: 内存主线本周完成从「获利了结」到「技术熊市」的降级：MU/三星/海力士较高点均回撤逾20%，半导体自6月25日累计蒸发约1.5万亿美元市值，Burry 做空美光把空头叙事推上台面。但同一周 UBS 把 CXL ASIC 市场定量到2030年70-100亿美元并近乎翻倍上调 ALAB 目标价——资金在内存墙叙事内部从「涨价周期」向「互连架构」轮动。十张卡八张更新（MU/SKHY/SSNLF/ALAB/MRVL/PSTG/SNDK/RMBS），AVGO/TER 未变；无换股提议。Everpure 代码已由 PSTG 改为 P，建议下次月度深审时处理卡片键名。
postMemory.take_en: Memory got downgraded this week from profit-taking to technical bear: MU, Samsung and SK Hynix all fell 20%+ off their highs, semis have shed ~$1.5T since June 25, and Burry's Micron short put the bear case on stage. Yet the same week UBS quantified the CXL ASIC market at $7-10B by 2030 and nearly doubled ALAB's target — money rotating inside the memory-wall story from pricing cycle to interconnect architecture. Eight of ten cards updated (MU/SKHY/SSNLF/ALAB/MRVL/PSTG/SNDK/RMBS), AVGO and TER unchanged; no swap proposals. Note: Everpure's ticker changed from PSTG to P — recommend handling the card key at the next monthly deep review.
